title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: PayPal is using AI to accelerate development workflows, with high-adoption teams deploying daily and completing a 3,000-app Java upgrade 6x faster. Cursor projects PayPal could deliver 40% more capabilities in 2026.
